item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p03","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response brakes the requested N+1 local overlay from the first sentence, explicitly refuses adding the parking reminder to the SMS, reframes the prior entrance/invite, sign-in/form, and routing/signage fixes as one repeated downstream information-overlay mechanism, and moves ownership upstream to a unified arrival/on-site handoff system. It does not supply parking-reminder copy, placement, field text, or implementation steps for the requested patch."}
